title: Daily Briefing: Trump talks 'taking Cuba'
shortDescription: Cuba's electric grid fails as US talks new relations. Here is the news to know on Tuesday.

title: Can the FCC punish Iran war coverage? What the First Amendment says
shortDescription: Experts said the First Amendment and Communications Act of 1934 would support broadcasters in any potential FCC attempts to revoke their licenses.

title: Trump's hard lesson: It's easier to get into a war than out of it
shortDescription: On week three of the U.S.-Israel strikes on Iran, the war is expanding and the consequences are intensifying, including at the gas pump.

title: Illinois Democrats push anti-Trump, ICE boundaries in Senate race
shortDescription: An aggressive style has helped Lt. Gov. Juliana Stratton surge in the polls, which have recently swung between her and Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi.

title: Trump says ‘taking Cuba’ would be a ‘big honor’
shortDescription: "I think I could do anything I want with it." In comments to reporters, President Donald Trump said "taking Cuba" would be a "big honor."

title: Trump says Iran war unlikely to end this week
shortDescription: "It'll be soon." President Donald Trump said that while the war with Iran is unlikely to wrap up this week, it "won't be long."

title: Trump Kennedy Center board votes to shut it down for 2 years
shortDescription: The Trump Kennedy Center's board voted unanimously to approve the president’s proposed renovations and shutdown the center for two years.

title: Trump says others should help police Strait of Hormuz. See responses
shortDescription: President Donald Trump has said other countries should send ships to reopen the Strait of Hormuz. NATO and others seem hesitant about the Iran war.

title: Trump reveals Rep. Neal Dunn's heart illness
shortDescription: Speculation about Rep. Neal Dunn's health started when he announced he wouldn't run again. President Donald Trump revealed his illness March 16.

title: Trump touts US military, saying no allies needed
shortDescription: "We don't need anybody." President Donald Trump said the United States doesn't need allies because "we're the strongest nation in the world."

title: Trump comments on Susie Wiles recent diagnosis
shortDescription: President Donald Trump says Susie Wiles will recover well after a breast cancer diagnosis and calls her an "amazing fighter."

title: Trump reveal of lawmaker's terminal diagnosis causes awkward moment
shortDescription: Trump said retiring GOP Rep. Neal Dunn, R-Florida, would have been "dead by June" before he had White House doctors intervene.

title: Democrats want Trump admin to investigate if Kristi Noem lied to Congress
shortDescription: Top congressional Democrats referred evidence to the DOJ March 16 that they say indicates DHS Secretary Kristi Noem lied to Congress.

title: What to know about Susie Wiles, Trump's chief of staff
shortDescription: White House Chief of Staff Susie Wiles, has been diagnosed with breast cancer, President Donald Trump announced. Here's what to know about her.

title: Susie Wiles, Trump's chief of staff, diagnosed with breast cancer
shortDescription: Wiles will continue serving in her role at the White House during treatment for early-stage breast cancer. She's encouraged by a "good prognosis."

title: This SAVE America Act could permanently reshape elections
shortDescription: The SAVE America Act would require states to share voter rolls with the federal government. What does that means for elections?

title: Trump calls for protection of Strait of Hormuz
shortDescription: Trump pushes countries to help secure the Strait of Hormuz amid rising Middle East tensions and stalled international commitments.

title: Midterm primaries continue this week. Here's what's up for grabs.
shortDescription: Illinois voters go to polls on March 17.
